prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约1305→3091→1985，2024年大幅后移后2025年明显回升，近两年波动较大；2025年基准约1985名；本省理科计划2023 年17人，2024年增至22人，2025年维持22人；2026年计划22人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招信号。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第35名（2021–2026年稳定在33 –35名区间），为顶尖财经类院校；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度一般（总排名第99位），短视频曝光量中等偏下；工商管理A+、应用经济学A+、理论经济学A、统计学A-，共4个A-及以上学科，财经学科实力顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业热度2021年偏热后逐步降 温，2022–2024年处于分化观望状态；本省2026年考生总数约23.8万（较2025年理科5.25万大幅增长），按比例估算理科考生约16.3万，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次回升趋势、2026年招生计划持平、本省考生规模大幅增长及财经类专业热度分化观望，在2025年基准1985名基础上预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约2000名，区间1700–2300名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（1700–2300名）内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（1700名以内）可重点冲击金融学、会计学（ACCA）等王牌 专业；位次接近区间上限（2300名附近）建议优先考虑二档专业，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science was approximately 1305 → 3091 → 1985. In 2024, there was a significant backward shift, followed by a clear recovery in 2025, with considerable fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 1985th place. The provincial Science enrollment plan was 17 students in 2023, increased to 22 in 2024, and remained at 22 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 22 students, unchanged from 2025, with no signals of expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 35th (stable in the 33–35 range from 2021 to 2026), making it a top-tier finance and economics institution. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. Douyin popularity is average (ranked 99th overall), with short video exposure at a medium-low level. It has A+ in Business Administration and Applied Economics, A in Theoretical Economics, and A- in Statistics, totaling four A- or above disciplines, with top-tier strength in finance and economics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of finance/accounting/economics majors has gradually cooled since a peak in 2021, entering a state of divergence and wait-and-see from 2022 to 2024. The total number of provincial examinees in 2026 is about 238,000 (a significant increase from 52,500 Science examinees in 2025), with an estimated 163,000 Science examinees, leading to notably intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the upward trend in rankings in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the substantial increase in the number of provincial examinees, and the divergent and wait-and-see state of finance and economics major popularity, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 1985th place. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2000th, with a range of 1700–2300.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Law (Double Degree, Law and Finance)
- Economics
- Insurance (Actuarial Science and Big Data)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Information Management and Information Systems
- Journalism
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (1700–2300), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 1700), you can prioritize top-tier majors such as Finance and Accounting (ACCA). If your ranking is near the upper bound of the range (around 2300), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 2 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 308 → 281 → 349, fluctuating narrowly within the 280–350 range; in 2025, it shifted back by about 68 places compared to 2024; the 2025 baseline is approximately 349; the provincial liberal arts enrollment plan from 2023 to 2026 is consistently 6 students, unchanged for four consecutive years, with no signals of expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 35th on the Soft Science main list, a top-tier finance and economics institution; reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; moderate popularity on Douyin; Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, Statistics A-, with top-tier strength in finance and economics disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popularity of finance/accounting/economics majors is mixed with a wait-and-see attitude; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is approximately 238,000 (a significant increase from 24,000 liberal arts examinees in 2025), with an estimated 75,000 liberal arts examinees, leading to intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend in 2025 rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the substantial increase in the number of provincial examinees, and the mixed popularity of finance and economics majors, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 349; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 360, with a range of 306–414.
